stan_swiata.temat: Konflikt USA-Iran / Zamknięcie Cieśniny Ormuz / Groźba Kharg Island
stan_swiata.opis: Trump explicitly threatens to seize Kharg Island; mutual strikes continue day two — Kharg threat is a qualitative escalation in rhetoric, energy price risk for Poland remains elevated, counter reset.
World Bank warns US-Iran war will push global economy to post-COVID low — new development with indirect but real impact on Polish economy and employment.
US inflation and Trump economic policy — continuing to decay into background, absorbed into broader US-Iran economic risk.
Conflict ongoing on Poland's eastern border with no qualitative change — deep background.
Iran's nuclear programme remains salient given active US-Iran war, but no new IAEA development this cycle.
Xi Jinping in Pyongyang — strategic shift with indirect NATO/Poland relevance, no new development, deep background.
Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon (17 killed) and Gaza ongoing — deep background, minimal direct impact on Poland.
